

Examples

All example scripts are in the examples/ directory.

Initial Value Problems (IVP)

Simulate photoacoustic wave propagation from an initial pressure distribution.

ExampleDescription
ivp_homogeneous_medium_2d.jl2D IVP in a lossless homogeneous medium
ivp_heterogeneous_medium_2d.jl2D IVP with spatially varying sound speed
ivp_absorption_2d.jl2D IVP with power-law absorption
ivp_1d_simulation.jl1D propagation — comparison with analytical solution
ivp_3d_simulation.jl3D IVP with full pressure field output

Time-Varying Source Problems (TVSP)

Simulate propagation from a driven transducer source.

ExampleDescription
tvsp_homogeneous_medium_2d.jl2D CW source in homogeneous medium
tvsp_nonlinear_propagation_1d.jl1D nonlinear wave distortion (comparison with Mendousse solution)

Photoacoustic Reconstruction (PR)

Reconstruct initial pressure distributions from time-series sensor data.

ExampleDescription
pr_fft_reconstruction_2d.jl2D k-space FFT reconstruction from a line sensor
pr_time_reversal_2d.jl2D time-reversal reconstruction

Sensor Directivity (SD)

ExampleDescription
sd_sensor_directivity_2d.jl2D directional sensor frequency response

Ultrasound (US)

Pulse-echo and beamforming simulations.

ExampleDescription
us_beamforming_2d.jl2D delay-and-sum beamforming with KWaveTransducer
us_phased_array_3d.jl3D phased array with KWaveArray

Elastic Wave Propagation (EWP)

ExampleDescription
ewp_elastic_2d.jl2D P and S wave propagation

Diffusion / Bioheat (DIFF)

ExampleDescription
diff_bioheat_1d.jl1D bioheat with comparison to analytical solution

Visualization

ExampleDescription
vis_cairomakie_2d.jlStatic 2D plots with CairoMakie
vis_glmakie_interactive.jlInteractive 3D visualization with GLMakie
vis_wglmakie_notebook.jlWGLMakie Jupyter notebook visualization
